code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Initializing: App starts

    Initializing --> Loading: Load cached notifications
    Loading --> Subscribing: Cache loaded
    Loading --> Error: Load failed

    Subscribing --> Active: Subscriptions ready
    Subscribing --> Error: Subscription failed

    Active --> Active: New notification arrives
    Active --> Processing: User interaction
    Active --> Updating: Mark as read

    Processing --> Active: Interaction complete
    Updating --> Active: Update complete

    Active --> Cleanup: 30 days passed
    Cleanup --> Active: Old notifications removed

    Error --> Retrying: Retry after delay
    Retrying --> Subscribing: Retry attempt
    Retrying --> Failed: Max retries reached

    Failed --> [*]: Unrecoverable error

    state Active {
        [*] --> Unread
        Unread --> Read: Mark as read
        Read --> Archived: Archive
        Archived --> Deleted: Delete
        Deleted --> [*]
    }

    note right of Active
        Notification lifecycle:
        - Arrives as Unread
        - User marks as Read
        - Auto-archived after 7 days
        - Deleted after 30 days
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个通知中心的状态图。整体流程是：应用启动后先初始化，然后尝试加载缓存的通知，加载成功后进入订阅状态，订阅就绪就变成活跃状态。如果加载或订阅失败，要有重试机制，最多重试几次后如果还不行就进入失败终态。
明白了，起点是初始化。那活跃状态内部需要细分吗？比如通知有已读未读的区别？
对，Active内部是个子状态机：新通知进来默认是Unread，用户标记后变成Read，然后7天后自动归档到Archived，再过30天删除。另外活跃状态下如果用户交互会短暂进入Processing，标记已读时会进入Updating状态。
确认一下：Processing和Updating都是临时状态，完成后回到Active；Active还有个Cleanup状态用于清理旧通知，清理完也回到Active。另外Error状态触发Retrying，Retrying可以回到Subscribing，也可能走到Failed终止。
没错。还有个小细节：活跃状态下新通知到达是自循环，不用离开Active。最后给Active加条注释说明生命周期：到达为未读→用户标记已读→7天自动归档→30天删除。
好的，我来画。起点[*]指向Initializing，标注"App starts"；Initializing到Loading是加载缓存；Loading成功到Subscribing，失败到Error；Subscribing成功到Active，失败也到Error。
等等，Loading到Subscribing的标注应该是"Cache loaded"，不是"加载成功"这种口语。还有Error到Retrying要标注"Retry after delay"，Retrying到Failed是"Max retries reached"。
已修正标注。现在画Active子状态：内部起点到Unread，Unread到Read是"Mark as read"，Read到Archived是"Archive"，Archived到Deleted是"Delete"，Deleted到终态。同时加上Active的注释框说明完整生命周期。
完美。Cleanup的触发条件是"30 days passed"，回到Active的标注是"Old notifications removed"。最后Failed到终态标注"Unrecoverable error"。
全部确认：主流程从初始化到加载到订阅到活跃，活跃内部有未读-已读-归档-删除的完整生命周期，活跃支持新通知到达、用户交互、标记已读、定期清理四个动作，错误有重试兜底，最终不可恢复时终止。图示已完成。
